mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIA.TB_ALARM_MST (ALARMNO, SYSNAME, EQUIPTYPE, UNIT, ALARMTIME, RECEIVETIME, ALARMLOC, ALARMMSG, ALARMLEVEL, LINE_NAME) SELECT (SELECT NEXTVAL('nia.seq_alarmno') ::VARCHAR), #{sysname}, #{equiptype}, #{unit}, #{alarmtime}::TIMESTAMP, #{receivetime}::TIMESTAMP, #{alarmloc}, #{alarmmsg}, #{alarmlevel}, #{lineName} WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM NIA.TB_ALARM_MST A WHERE A.SYSNAME = #{sysname} AND A.UNIT = #{unit} AND A.RECEIVETIME = #{receivetime} AND A.ALARMLOC = #{alarmloc} AND A.ALARMMSG = #{alarmmsg} AND A.ALARMLEVEL = #{alarmlevel} ) ON CONFLICT (ALARMNO) DO NOTHING
